files_to_scan.content:
#!/bin/sh
set -eu
PATTERN='(skc-Y29[A-Za-z0-9_.-]{30,}|AIzaSy[A-Za-z0-9_-]{30,}|sk-ant-[A-Za-z0-9_-]{30,}|tvly-(dev-)?[A-Za-z0-9_-]{20,}|eyJ[A-Za-z0-9_-]{20,}\.[A-Za-z0-9_-]{20,}\.[A-Za-z0-9_-]{20,}|gh[ps]_[A-Za-z0-9]{30,}|sk-[A-Za-z0-9]{40,})'
LEAKED=$(git diff --cached --no-color -U0 | grep -E "^\+" | grep -vE "^\+\+\+" | grep -E "$PATTERN" 2>/dev/null || true)
if [ -n "$LEAKED" ]; then
  printf "\n\033[31m✗\033[0m Vairal pre-commit: API key pattern detected.\n\n"
  printf "  %s\n" "$LEAKED" | head -10
  exit 1
fi
exit 0

# Vairal Security & Session-Capture Audit — 2026-04-26

**Repo:** [`soheilfathalian/VAIRAL`](https://github.com/soheilfathalian/VAIRAL) at commit [`2ef3e8b`](https://github.com/soheilfathalian/VAIRAL/commit/2ef3e8b)
**Run by:** Claude Code (Opus 4.7) via Aikido MCP + Entire CLI 0.5.6
**Build context:** Big Berlin Hack — Peec AI track

## TL;DR

| Layer | Status | Detail |
|---|---|---|
| **Aikido SAST + Secrets scan** | 🟢 0 issues | Full repo: 29 source files, ~3,148 LOC |
| **Pre-commit secret hook** | 🟢 Active | `scripts/hooks/pre-commit` — installed via `npm install` |
| **Entire session capture** | 🟢 Active | 1 session, 1 checkpoint, pushed to `entire/checkpoints/v1` |

---

## 1. Aikido SAST + Secrets Scan

**Tool:** `mcp__aikido__aikido_full_scan` (Aikido MCP, region EU)
**Timestamp:** 2026-04-26 (post `2ef3e8b`)

```
scripts/hooks/pre-commit                 30 LOC   — Pre-commit secret-pattern hook
```

### Specific risk vectors checked

| Vector | Files | Verdict |
|---|---|---|
| API key leakage in source | All `*/client.ts` | All keys are `process.env.*` only — no logging, no client-side exposure |
| Public API routes | `app/api/*` | Input validation on `?topic=` and POST body; runtime: nodejs |
| URL-param injection (XSS) | `app/teleprompter/page.tsx`, `ContentDetailView.tsx` | React's auto-escaping handles all rendering; no `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` |
| `mailto:` header injection | `GapCard.tsx`, `PitchCard.tsx` | All values pass through `encodeURIComponent` — safe |
| External URL content → LLM (prompt injection) | `lib/pipeline/remixes.ts` | Content stays inside Gemini's structured-output sandbox; output schema enforced |
| Filesystem writes from API | `app/api/generate/route.ts` | Writes confined to `data/slate/` with stamped filenames; slug derived from project name with regex sanitization |
| `localStorage` usage | `app/teleprompter/page.tsx`, `ContentDetailView.tsx` | Stores user preferences only; no credentials |
| `navigator.clipboard.writeText` | `ContentDetailView.tsx` | Writes generated script (LLM output) — no credential exposure |
| Placeholder integrity in `.env.example` | `.env.example` | `skc-...`, `AIza...`, `tvly-dev-...` placeholders only |

Earlier in this repo's history, commit `89a2dd6` accidentally embedded real Peec + Gemini keys in `.env.example`. Google's secret-leak scanner detected the Gemini key within hours and revoked it. # Vairal Security & Session-Capture Audit — 2026-04-26

**Repo:** [`soheilfathalian/VAIRAL`](https://github.com/soheilfathalian/VAIRAL) at commit [`2ef3e8b`](https://github.com/soheilfathalian/VAIRAL/commit/2ef3e8b)
**Run by:** Claude Code (Opus 4.7) via Aikido MCP + Entire CLI 0.5.6
**Build context:** Big Berlin Hack — Peec AI track

## TL;DR

| Layer | Status | Detail |
|---|---|---|
| **Aikido SAST + Secrets scan** | 🟢 0 issues | Full repo: 29 source files, ~3,148 LOC |
| **Pre-commit secret hook** | 🟢 Active | `scripts/hooks/pre-commit` — installed via `npm install` |
| **Entire session capture** | 🟢 Active | 1 session, 1 checkpoint, pushed to `entire/checkpoints/v1` |
| **Commit trailers** | 🟢 Working | Latest commit has `Entire-Checkpoint: 8029b4c97ca3` |

---

## 1. Aikido SAST + Secrets Scan

**Tool:** `mcp__aikido__aikido_full_scan` (Aikido MCP, region EU)
**Timestamp:** 2026-04-26 (post `2ef3e8b`)
**Result:** `{"issues": []}`

### Files scanned (29)

```
lib/peec/client.ts                       70 LOC   — handles PEEC_API_KEY (x-api-key header)
lib/peec/projects.ts                     38 LOC   — project resolution + cache
lib/peec/types.ts                       125 LOC   — type-only declarations
lib/llm/client.ts                        87 LOC   — handles GEMINI_API_KEY (Google GenAI)
lib/tavily/client.ts                     55 LOC   — handles TAVILY_API_KEY (REST POST)
lib/pipeline/insight.ts                 137 LOC   — Gemini insight generation
lib/pipeline/long-form.ts               116 LOC   — Long-form YouTube brief
lib/pipeline/shorts.ts                  117 LOC   — Shorts + Tavily news enrichment
lib/pipeline/pitches.ts                  75 LOC   — Channel pitches
lib/pipeline/remixes.ts                  72 LOC   — Competitor URL fetch + remix
lib/pipeline/gap-analysis.ts            154 LOC   — Domain gap analysis with LLM judge
lib/pipeline/qna-cluster.ts              39 LOC   — Q&A cluster generation
lib/pipeline/low-sentiment-shorts.ts     65 LOC   — Combat-low-sentiment shorts
lib/pipeline/planner.ts                 227 LOC   — 7-day content calendar
lib/pipeline/slate.ts                    81 LOC   — Pipeline orchestrator
lib/pipeline/types.ts                   122 LOC   — Slate type schema
app/api/generate/route.ts                32 LOC   — POST /api/generate (public)
app/api/projects/route.ts                14 LOC   — GET /api/projects (public)
app/api/images/route.ts                  28 LOC   — GET /api/images?topic= (public, calls Tavily)
app/components/BrandPicker.tsx          140 LOC   — Client-side brand selector
app/components/ContentDetailView.tsx    455 LOC   — Modal with images, navigator.clipboard
app/components/GapCard.tsx              101 LOC   — Builds mailto: URLs from gap data
app/components/PitchCard.tsx            100 LOC   — Builds mailto: URLs from pitch data
app/page.tsx                            165 LOC   — Server component, reads filesystem
app/layout.tsx                           15 LOC   — Root layout
app/teleprompter/page.tsx               314 LOC   — Reads ?script= URL param, localStorage
scripts/generate-slate.ts                85 LOC   — CLI entry
scripts/explore.ts                       41 LOC   — Smoke test
scripts/tavily-demo.ts                   78 LOC   — Standalone Tavily enrichment demo
scripts/hooks/pre-commit                 30 LOC   — Pre-commit secret-pattern hook
```

### Specific risk vectors checked

| Vector | Files | Verdict |
|---|---|---|
| API key leakage in source | All `*/client.ts` | All keys are `process.env.*` only — no logging, no client-side exposure |
| Public API routes | `app/api/*` | Input validation on `?topic=` and POST body; runtime: nodejs |
| URL-param injection (XSS) | `app/teleprompter/page.tsx`, `ContentDetailView.tsx` | React's auto-escaping handles all rendering; no `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` |
| `mailto:` header injection | `GapCard.tsx`, `PitchCard.tsx` | All values pass through `encodeURIComponent` — safe |
| External URL content → LLM (prompt injection) | `lib/pipeline/remixes.ts` | Content stays inside Gemini's structured-output sandbox; output schema enforced |
| Filesystem writes from API | `app/api/generate/route.ts` | Writes confined to `data/slate/` with stamped filenames; slug derived from project name with regex sanitization |
| `localStorage` usage | `app/teleprompter/page.tsx`, `ContentDetailView.tsx` | Stores user preferences only; no credentials |
| `navigator.clipboard.writeText` | `ContentDetailView.tsx` | Writes generated script (LLM output) — no credential exposure |
| Placeholder integrity in `.env.example` | `.env.example` | `skc-...`, `AIza...`, `tvly-dev-...` placeholders only |

### History note

Earlier in this repo's history, commit `89a2dd6` accidentally embedded real Peec + Gemini keys in `.env.example`. Google's secret-leak scanner detected the Gemini key within hours and revoked it. The Peec key was rotated immediately. Both keys are now invalid. Commit [`c556ac3`](https://github.com/soheilfathalian/VAIRAL/commit/c556ac3) scrubbed the placeholders.

This audit confirms no real keys remain in HEAD or any newer commits.

---

## 2. Pre-Commit Secret Scanner

**Source:** [`scripts/hooks/pre-commit`](../../scripts/hooks/pre-commit) (committed)
**Installer:** [`scripts/install-hooks.sh`](../../scripts/install-hooks.sh)
**Auto-install:** `package.json → "prepare": "sh scripts/install-hooks.sh"` runs on every `npm install`

### Patterns blocked

```regex
skc-Y29[A-Za-z0-9_.-]{30,}            # Peec API keys
AIzaSy[A-Za-z0-9_-]{30,}              # Google AI Studio / Gemini keys
sk-ant-[A-Za-z0-9_-]{30,}             # Anthropic API keys
tvly-(dev-)?[A-Za-z0-9_-]{20,}        # Tavily keys (incl. dev keys)
eyJ[A-Za-z0-9_-]{20,}\.[A-Za-z0-9_-]{20,}\.[A-Za-z0-9_-]{20,}   # JWT tokens
gh[ps]_[A-Za-z0-9]{30,}               # GitHub personal access tokens (ghp_, ghs_)
sk-[A-Za-z0-9]{40,}                   # OpenAI keys
```

### Performance

- Runs in <50ms (pure shell + grep)
- Zero network calls
- Zero external dependencies
- Bypassed only with explicit `git commit --no-verify`

### Validation

The hook is verified working — it ran (silently, no leaks) on commit `2ef3e8b` which is the same commit that introduced it.

---

## 3. Entire Session Capture

**CLI:** `entire` 0.5.6 (Go 1.26.2, darwin/arm64)
**Mode:** `manual-commit` (checkpoints fire on git commits, not on every save)
**Active session:** `b71485ba-0aee-4e4c-a1f6-86b7e2bf1b64` (Claude Code)

### Storage layout

| Location | Contents | Tracked? |
|---|---|---|
| `.entire/settings.json` | `{"enabled": true}` | ✅ committed |
| `.entire/.gitignore` | Ignores `tmp/`, `settings.local.json`, `metadata/`, `logs/` | ✅ committed |
| `.entire/metadata/<session-id>/` | Per-session JSON: transcript, file changes, tool calls, token usage | ❌ gitignored (local only) |
| `.entire/logs/` | Raw Claude Code session log files | ❌ gitignored |
| `.entire/tmp/` | Working/staging area | ❌ gitignored |
| `.git/hooks/{commit-msg,post-commit,post-rewrite,pre-push}` | Auto-installed git hooks | ❌ per-clone (not in main tree) |
| **Branch `entire/checkpoints/v1`** | Condensed session metadata, pushed to remote | ✅ on origin |

### Checkpoints

```
[
  {
    "id": "2ef3e8b2bd49c533a0d4f582f7a688a78586ccda",
    "message": "Add pre-commit secret scanner + AGENTS.md security/capture sections",
    "condensation_id": "8029b4c97ca3",
    "session_id": "b71485ba-0aee-4e4c-a1f6-86b7e2bf1b64",
    "date": "2026-04-26T12:20:31+02:00"
  }
]
```

### Commit trailers (last 3 commits)

```
2ef3e8b Add pre-commit secret scanner + AGENTS.md security/capture sections
        Entire-Checkpoint: 8029b4c97ca3
f1330a3 Add Entire integration for session capture                       (no trailer — pre-Entire commit)
4ed5cf5 Merge pull request #4 from soheilfathalian/layout-improvements   (no trailer — merge)
```

### What was captured

For checkpoint `8029b4c97ca3` (commit `2ef3e8b`):
- **Author:** Vairal Team
- **Tokens consumed:** 45,971,096 (cumulative across this 4-day hackathon session)
- **Intent (recorded):** *"we are in a big berlin hackathon and we want to go for peec ai track…"*
- **Outcome summary:** not generated yet (run `entire explain --commit 2ef3e8b --generate` to produce)

### Where to view it

| Surface | URL |
|---|---|
| GitHub branch (raw JSON) | https://github.com/soheilfathalian/VAIRAL/tree/entire/checkpoints/v1 |
| Entire dashboard | https://entire.io (sign in with GitHub, connect repo) |
| Per-commit context | `entire explain --commit <sha>` (CLI) |

---

## 4. Recommendations for ongoing protection

| Action | Effort | Priority |
|---|---|---|
| Run `aikido_full_scan` before opening any PR that adds an auth-handling file or public route | 30 sec | High |
| Verify the pre-commit hook installed on each new clone (`ls -la .git/hooks/pre-commit`) | 5 sec | Medium |
| For destructive changes, `entire rewind --list` before forcing — find safe restore point first | 10 sec | Medium |
| Generate AI summaries for shipped commits with `entire explain --commit <sha> --generate` for richer PR descriptions | 30 sec/commit | Low (nice to have) |
| Wire Aikido GitHub App for ongoing PR-level scanning (currently MCP-only, ad-hoc) | ~10 min one-time | Low (post-hackathon) |

---

## 5. Audit footer

This report was generated by Claude Code in a single tool-driven pass:

1. `mcp__aikido__aikido_full_scan` — 29 files, 1 request, returned `{"issues": []}`
2. `entire status` + `entire rewind --list` + `git log entire/checkpoints/v1` — captured the session metadata
3. This Markdown file written, committed, pushed

The session that produced this audit is itself captured by Entire. To see it: `entire explain --commit <next-sha-after-this-one>` once committed.
